mapper.select: /* adm-role-rolebyuser-sql-oracle.xml - selectTAdminMstRo */ SELECT '0' AS CHK ,ROKEY ,RONM FROM TADMIN_MST_RO

/* adm-role-rolebyuser-sql-oracle.xml - selectRoleByUser */ SELECT '0' AS CHK ,URXROGT.ROKEY AS ROKEY ,RO.RONM AS RONM ,URXROGT.URKEY AS URKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_URXROGT URXROGT INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_RO RO ON URXROGT.ROKEY = RO.ROKEY WHERE URXROGT.URKEY = #{urkey}
